ai_summary: Short pressure is broad: 20 stocks exceed the threshold and 95% show rising short turnover versus their 5-day average, indicating active widespread bearish positioning.
Price action confirms the signal. Score-weighted return of -2.25% shows that the highest-conviction shorts are declining in line with positioning.
Elevated squeeze risk. 4 high-pressure names show positive returns despite strong short positioning, raising the risk of disorderly short covering.
Pressure is concentrated in liquid names: Park Systems, SHIFT UP, SK hynix rank at the top, which may reflect institutional or macro-driven positioning.
